KVK açıklaması

Our technology continues to growing at a dizzying pace every day. Today, when globalization dominates, communication technologies also gain new dimensions in the rate of improvement. Naturally, the person who compete with time wants to get all kinds of information in the shortest time.

For this reason, it has gained great importance to provide information with artistic and technological solutions within the system.

Department of Visual Communication design in accordance with the principles of basic communication, art and culture, web design, graphic design, performing arts, advertising, photography, cinema, television and multimedia branches in the entirety of the education of these branches The designer aims to educate individuals with a versatile competence and social consciousness that can be involved in creative or managerial staff.
